canvasOverlay.viewerPanZoom: Drag to pan, wheel to zoom

preview3dOverlay.dragWaypointMobile: Drag a waypoint grip up or down to adjust elevation
preview3dOverlay.dragWaypointDesktop: Drag waypoint handles up or down to adjust elevation
preview3dOverlay.dragDiveGateMobile: Drag ring to rotate · orange puck to tilt
preview3dOverlay.dragDiveGateDesktop: Drag ring to rotate · drag orange puck to tilt
preview3dOverlay.orbitHint: Orbit to inspect · scroll to zoom · middle-drag to pan
preview3dOverlay.drawRoute: Draw the route in 2D to enable fly-through

statusBar.snapOnDescription: Points and drags lock to nearby grid positions, objects, and route points. Hold Alt while placing or dragging to bypass it once.
statusBar.snapOffDescription: Placement and dragging stay freeform until you turn snap back on.

mobileAppMenu.title: TrackDraw
mobileAppMenu.subtitle: Projects, sharing, account and app settings
mobileAppMenu.profileDescription: Manage profile, security and API keys
mobileAppMenu.shareDescription: Publish a read-only link for this track
mobileAppMenu.importDescription: Bring in a JSON project file
mobileAppMenu.exportDescription: Download PNG, PDF, SVG or JSON

layoutPresetPicker.signInDescription: Presets are saved to your account so they're always available across all your devices.
layoutPresetPicker.noPresetsDescription: Select multiple shapes on the canvas and use Save preset in the inspector to add your first preset here.
layoutPresetPicker.comingSoonDescription: Community-shared presets will appear here. Save your own presets and share them with the TrackDraw community.
layoutPresetPicker.mobileSubtitle: Choose a preset, then tap once on the canvas to place it.
layoutPresetPicker.placeFlowDescription: Select a preset here, then tap the canvas. The result expands immediately into ordinary editable shapes.
layoutPresetPicker.desktopSubtitle: Choose a preset, place it on the canvas, then edit the inserted shapes normally.
layoutPresetPicker.tipText: Select shapes on the canvas, then use Save preset in the inspector to add your own.

dialog.title: Welcome to TrackDraw
dialog.mobileSubtitle: Place a few gates, draw the route, check 3D, then share when the track is ready.
dialog.desktopDescription: Design the layout in 2D, review elevation in 3D, and share a read-only link when the track is ready.

gate.title: Place your first gate
gate.description: Tap or click on the canvas to drop the first gate. Add a few gates before switching to Path.

path.title: Next, draw the route
path.description: Place a few gates first, then switch to Path and trace the lap through them. Finish the route before checking 3D.

preview3d.title: 3D works best after the route
preview3d.description: Obstacle placement already previews here, but the route is what makes elevation and fly-through review useful.

review3d.title: Now review it in 3D
review3d.description: Orbit around the route, check elevation and spacing, then share or export once the layout feels right.

postPath.title: Route ready — check it in 3D
postPath.description: Switch to the 3D tab now to review the route before refining more obstacle placement.

step1.title: Place a few gates and obstacles
step1.description: Start small so the course structure appears quickly.

step2.title: Draw the race path through them
step2.description: The path usually makes the layout click faster than obstacle tweaking alone.

step3.title: Check 3D, then export or share
step3.description: Review the route early and send a read-only link when it is ready.

open-practice.name: Open practice
open-practice.title: Open Practice Layout
open-practice.description: Open flow with a start area and room to build your own lap.

compact-race-start.name: Compact race start
compact-race-start.title: Compact Race Start
compact-race-start.description: Tight opening with an immediate gate line and early turn.

technical-ladder-line.name: Technical ladder line
technical-ladder-line.title: Technical Ladder Line
technical-ladder-line.description: First gate, two ladders, and a follow-up gate for quick rhythm.

guided.label: Guided start
guided.title: Start with guidance
guided.descriptionDesktop: Open an empty field with `Gate` selected so you can block out the course first. Draw the path once the first obstacles are down.
guided.descriptionMobile: Open an empty field with Gate selected. Draw the path once the first obstacles are down.

empty.label: Empty start
empty.description: Skip the guided start and open the empty studio instead.

saveAsPresetDialog.title: Save as preset
saveAsPresetDialog.subtitle: Give your selection a name so you can place it again from the preset picker.
saveAsPresetDialog.pathsExcluded: {count, plural, one {1 path will be excluded} other {# paths will be excluded}} — presets only capture non-path shapes.

fitToField.label: Fit to field
fitToField.description: Center the current design in view

snap.label: Snap
snap.description: Lock to nearby grid positions and objects

rulers.label: Rulers
rulers.description: Show top and left guides on mobile

obstacleNumbers.label: Obstacle numbers
obstacleNumbers.description: Show path numbers on route obstacles

descriptions.readOnly: No route in this shared track
descriptions.draw: Draw a path in 2D first to enable this

gizmo.label: Gizmo
gizmo.description: Show the axis helper in 3D preview

readOnly.review3dWithPath: Read-only 3D review with fly-through available for this shared track.
readOnly.review3dNoPath: Read-only 3D review for this shared track. No route is available for fly-through.
readOnly.review2dWithPath: Read-only 2D review for this shared track. Switch to 3D to use fly-through.
readOnly.review2dNoPath: Read-only 2D review for this shared track.

header.title: Multi-select
header.lockedHint: Locked selection. Unlock before moving or resizing.
header.tapHint: Tap items to add or remove them.

status.tapToStart: Tap the canvas to place the first point

toolDescriptions.label: Add notes on the canvas
toolDescriptions.polyline: Draw or edit the race line

subtitles.preview3d: Project actions for the current 3D session

view.title: View
view.subtitle: Canvas mode, guides and viewport controls

shell.localAutosaveFailedDescription: The latest edits are still on the canvas, but TrackDraw could not save a local copy. Retry now, or export a JSON backup before leaving this browser.
shell.latestLocalCopySaved: The latest local copy was saved.
shell.localAutosaveStillFailingDescription: Export a JSON backup before making more changes if browser storage keeps failing.
shell.exportFailedDescription: {message} Try again, or open Export and download a project JSON backup from there.
shell.exportFailedNoProjectDescription: TrackDraw could not load this local project. Open it first or choose another saved project.
